data.name: richTextBox1.Text
data.value:
Telltale Workbench
A comprehensive toolkit for Telltale Games resource files.
Based on TTG Tools by Den Em (Е.Д.В.) and Pashok6798. Originally modded by Krisp and HeitorSpectre.
Modules: • Archive Unpacker - Extract .ttarch / .ttarch2 archives • Landb Editor - Edit & normalize .landb translation files • Landb Reviewer - Side-by-side translation comparison • Ttarch2 Scanner - Scan and analyze archive structures • Font Creator - Create & edit .font texture files • Archive Packer - Create .ttarch / .ttarch2 archives • Auto (De)Packer - Decrypt, unpack & repack game assets • Settings - Configure tool preferences
GitHub: https://github.com/slankka/Telltale-Workbench
========================================
Special thanks to: - Den Em for accepting to upload his source code. - Aluigi for source code of ttarchext. - Taylor Hornby for C# source code of Blowfish encryption. - Gdkchan, Stella/AboodXD for Nintendo Switch swizzle method. - Daemon1 and tge for PS4 swizzle algorithm. - Josh Tamely for Oodle wrapper. - Hajin Jang for Zlib.Wrapper. - Nemiroff for fixing bugs in the Font Editor. - Krisp for Xbox texture support and font editing with Swizzle. - Pashok6798 for his support to the community. - BennyBoy for the Poker Night Remastered encryption key.
======================================== Supported games: Telltale Texas Hold'em, Bone, Sam & Max (all seasons + Remastered), Strong Bad, Wallace & Gromit, Tales of Monkey Island, Hector, Puzzle Agent 1 & 2, Poker Night 1 & 2 (+ Remastered), Back to the Future, CSI (3D, Hard Evidence, Deadly Intent, Fatal Conspiracy), Jurassic Park, Law & Order: Legacies, The Walking Dead (S1-S4, Michonne, Definitive Series), The Wolf Among Us, Tales from the Borderlands, Game of Thrones, Minecraft: Story Mode (S1 & S2), Batman (S1 & S2), Guardians of the Galaxy.
======================================== FEATURES
[Font Editor - Core] - Load/edit/save .font files (5VSM / 6VSM / ERTM) - Multi-page texture support (DDS import/export) - Coordinate editor with real-time preview - Character generator with system font picker (TTF/OTF) - Missing character detection & auto generation - Smart gap-filling on texture pages - FNT import/export - YOffset & YAdjust batch controls - Profile system (save/load settings per font) - Drag-and-drop .font loading - Swizzle support: Nintendo Switch, PS4, PS Vita, Xbox 360, Nintendo Wii
[Font Editor - Switch Compatibility] - Full NewFormat font creation pipeline (New -> Import FNT -> Import DDS -> Save) - Hardware texture parameter block auto-injection - Header fix: offset 0x08 always 0 (structural separator) - FontName protection on FNT import
[Landb Editor] - Edit & normalize .landb translation files - CJK text normalization (fullwidth/halfwidth, quotes, spaces) - Find & replace in files with preview - Multi-match replace across all text blocks - Drag-and-drop .landb loading
[Landb Reviewer] - Side-by-side translation comparison - Tree view by text block & dialogue node - Card-based translation review with batch export
[Archive Packer] - Pack folders into ttarch / ttarch2 archives - [NEW]Oodle LZHLW & Kraken compression - Encryption key selection (40+ games) - [NEW]Last chunk padding control
[Archive Unpacker] - Extract ttarch / ttarch2 archives - Auto-detect game encryption keys - Search filter & format filter - [NEW]Oodle Kraken decompression support
[Ttarch2 Scanner] - Browse archive contents without extraction
